channel.title: OnThisDay
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from OnThisDay, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Today in History for 28th April 2026
item.description: Historical Events 1920 - Azerbaijan SSR joins USSR (1st time) 1940 - Glenn Miller records the song "Pennsylvania 6-5000" in NYC; tune is named after p...
